docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY KRASOW, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT KWAN, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KWAN, DAVID

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRASOW, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KWAN, DAVID $950.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $990.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
